system.description: The Battle-Brother spends the time before battle armouring himself against the power of the warp by reciting canticles and litanies of hate and contempt against the unclean powers.
system.benefit: This Talent may be used in the Oath Making phase before undertaking a mission. The Battle-Brother spends a Fate Point in the Oath Making phase and counts as having spent it for the mission. During the mission, whenever he is subjected to a Psychic Power, Daemonic Power, or other warp-based power, he may make a Challenging (+0) Willpower Test. If successful, he is unaffected by the power; if he fails, it affects him as normal. This also applies to powers that cause damage indirectly, such as blasts, and to friendly powers. Powers resisted in this way are not negated and may still affect others.

rollConfig.description: Willpower Test to resist psychic powers

specialAbilities.name: Abhor the Witch
specialAbilities.description: Spend a Fate Point at mission start (counts as spent for mission duration). Make +0 Willpower Tests to resist psychic/daemonic/warp powers. Success means unaffected; failure means normal effect. Applies to all warp-based powers including area effects and friendly powers.
